opinion.h: DEARHART v. VIRGINIA. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE SUPREME COURT OF APPEALS OF VIRGINIA. No. 745, Misc. Decided June 17, 1963.
opinion.p: Certiorari granted; judgment vacated; and case remanded.
Reno S. Harp III, Assistant Attorney General of Virginia, for respondent.

The motion for leave to proceed in forma pauperis and the petition for writ of certiorari are granted. The judgment is vacated and the case is remanded for further consideration in light of Douglas v. California, 372 U.S. 353, and Burns v. Ohio, 360 U.S. 252.
MR. JUSTICE CLARK and MR. JUSTICE HARLAN concur in the result.
